/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -DTF_MAJOR_VERSION=2 -DTF_MINOR_VERSION=20 -DTF_PATCH_VERSION=0 -DTF_VERSION_SUFFIX="" -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2501.0.0 -o libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2501.0.0 CMakeFiles/throw_delegate.dir/internal/throw_delegate.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN:" libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2501.0.0 libabsl_log_severity.so.2501.0.0
